title: Justicia aequilabris
taxonomy: Justicia aequilabris is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Justicia, which is a group of flowering plants known for their trumpet-shaped flowers. The species is native to tropical regions, specifically in southern Africa. Justicia aequilabris is an evergreen herb that grows in a variety of environments, including woodland and grassland areas. The plant's classification reflects its unique characteristics and its relationship to other members of the Acanthaceae family.
